allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
remove forwardRef for React 19 compatibility

Migrated all components from React.forwardRef to regular functions with
ref as a prop, following React 19''s new ref handling pattern. This
aligns with the official shadcn/ui approach for React 19.

Changes:
- Removed forwardRef usage from all UI components
- Updated type signatures to accept ref as an optional prop
- Kept displayName assignments for better DevTools experience
- Components now use: ref?: React.Ref<ElementRef<...>>

Updated components:
- AlertDialog \(6 components\)
- Checkbox
- Form \(5 components\)
- HoverCard
- Label
- Menubar \(9 components\)
- Popover
- Progress
- RadioGroup \(2 components\)
- Tabs \(3 components\)
- VideoPlayer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix session state becoming stale after login/logout

- Wire up logout button in nav-user sidebar
- Use resetQueries instead of invalidateQueries to clear session cache
- Forward redirect param from send to verify route
- Add CLAUDE.md with session invalidation pattern docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
